scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/test-cleanups.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/test-waste.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/test-health.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/test-tokens.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/test-settings.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/test-burn.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/test-models.mjs
scripts.package: npm run build && npm test && cd dist && zip -rq ../chathp-v$npm_package_version.zip . && cd .. && echo packaged: chathp-v$npm_package_version.zip
